Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT
    COALESCE\(asm.hostname, asm.ip_address\) as asset,
    asm.ip_address,
    asm.port,
    asm.protocol,
    asm.service,
    asm.type,
    asm.severity_ranking,
    asm.is_cloud,
    asm.cloud_provider,
    asm.country,
    asm.last_seen
FROM public.tenable_asm_assets asm
ORDER BY asm.severity_ranking, asm.ip_address, asm.port
LIMIT 50;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
WITH
    all_vulns AS \(
        SELECT tf.cve as cve_id, ta.hostname, ta.ipv4 as ip_address, 'Tenable' as source, tf.cvss_score
        FROM public.tenable_findings tf
        JOIN public.tenable_assets ta ON tf.asset_id = ta.id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT wv.cve_id, wi.name as hostname, NULL as ip_address, 'Wiz' as source, wv.cvss_score
        FROM public.wiz_vulnerabilities wv
        JOIN public.wiz_inventory wi ON wv.resource_id = wi.id
    \),
    prioritized_findings AS \(
        SELECT
            v.cve_id, v.hostname, v.ip_address,
            MAX\(v.cvss_score\) as max_cvss,
            STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT v.source, ', '\) as sources,
            EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.cisa_kev ck WHERE ck.cve_id = v.cve_id\) as in_cisa_kev,
            EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.tenable_asm_assets asm WHERE asm.hostname = v.hostname OR asm.ip_address = v.ip_address\) as in_asm,
            EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam WHERE \(ipam.hostname = v.hostname OR ipam.ip_address = v.ip_address\) AND \(ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%MGMT%' OR ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%OOB%'\)\) as in_mgmt_subnet,
            EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam WHERE \(ipam.hostname = v.hostname OR ipam.ip_address = v.ip_address\) AND ipam.is_gateway = true\) as is_gateway,
            EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.vt_results vt WHERE \(vt.target = v.hostname OR vt.target = v.ip_address\) AND vt.malicious >= 5\) as is_vt_malicious,
            \(SELECT MAX\(asm.last_seen\) FROM public.tenable_asm_assets asm WHERE asm.hostname = v.hostname OR asm.ip_address = v.ip_address\) as last_seen_asm,
            \(SELECT STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CAST\(asm.port AS TEXT\), ', '\) FROM public.tenable_asm_assets asm WHERE asm.hostname = v.hostname OR asm.ip_address = v.ip_address\) as exposed_ports,
            \(SELECT STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT asm.severity_ranking, ', '\) FROM public.tenable_asm_assets asm WHERE asm.hostname = v.hostname OR asm.ip_address = v.ip_address\) as asm_severity
        FROM all_vulns v
        GROUP BY v.cve_id, v.hostname, v.ip_address
    \)
SELECT
    p.cve_id,
    ck.vulnerability_name,
    p.hostname,
    p.ip_address,
    p.sources,
    p.max_cvss,
    p.in_cisa_kev,
    p.in_mgmt_subnet,
    p.is_gateway,
    p.is_vt_malicious,
    p.asm_severity,
    p.exposed_ports,
    p.last_seen_asm,
    \(
        COALESCE\(p.max_cvss, 0\) +
        \(CASE WHEN p.in_cisa_kev THEN 100 ELSE 0 END\) +
        \(CASE WHEN p.in_asm THEN 50 ELSE 0 END\) +
        \(CASE WHEN p.in_mgmt_subnet THEN 30 ELSE 0 END\) +
        \(CASE WHEN p.is_gateway THEN 20 ELSE 0 END\) +
        \(CASE WHEN p.is_vt_malicious THEN 50 ELSE 0 END\) +
        \(CASE WHEN p.sources LIKE '%Tenable%' AND p.sources LIKE '%Wiz%' THEN 20 ELSE 0 END\)
    \) as priority_score
FROM prioritized_findings p
LEFT JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON p.cve_id = ck.cve_id
WHERE p.in_asm = true
  AND p.last_seen_asm >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY priority_score DESC
LIMIT 10;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
WITH
  -- Active Tenable assets with confirmed public exposure via ASM open ports
  tenable_public AS \(
    SELECT DISTINCT
      tf.cve as cve_id,
      ta.hostname,
      ta.ipv4 as ip_address,
      'Tenable' as source,
      tf.cvss_score,
      ta.last_seen as asset_last_seen,
      ta.exposure_score,
      ta.os,
      STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CAST\(asm.port AS TEXT\), ', '\) as open_ports,
      STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT asm.service, ', '\) as services,
      MAX\(asm.last_seen\) as asm_last_seen,
      MIN\(asm.severity_ranking\) as asm_severity
    FROM public.tenable_findings tf
    JOIN public.tenable_assets ta ON tf.asset_id = ta.id
    JOIN public.tenable_asm_assets asm
      ON \(asm.hostname = ta.hostname OR asm.ip_address = ta.ipv4\)
    WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
      AND asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'
      AND asm.port IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY tf.cve, ta.hostname, ta.ipv4, tf.cvss_score, ta.last_seen, ta.exposure_score, ta.os
  \),
  -- Active Wiz resources with direct public IP
  wiz_public AS \(
    SELECT DISTINCT
      wv.cve_id,
      wi.name as hostname,
      wi.ip_addresses[1] as ip_address,
      'Wiz' as source,
      wv.cvss_score,
      wi.last_seen as asset_last_seen,
      NULL::numeric as exposure_score,
      NULL as os,
      NULL as open_ports,
      wv.asset_has_wide_internet_exposure,
      wv.has_exploit,
      wv.epss_score,
      wv.severity,
      wv.package_name,
      wi.provider,
      wi.region,
      wi.native_type
    FROM public.wiz_vulnerabilities wv
    JOIN public.wiz_inventory wi ON wv.resource_id = wi.id
    WHERE wi.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
      AND wi.status != 'deleted'
      AND wi.has_public_ip = true
      AND wv.status NOT IN \('RESOLVED', 'REJECTED'\)
      AND \(wv.asset_has_wide_internet_exposure = true OR wv.asset_has_limited_internet_exposure = true\)
  \),
  -- Combined prioritized
  combined AS \(
    -- Tenable public assets
    SELECT
      tp.cve_id,
      tp.hostname,
      tp.ip_address,
      tp.source,
      tp.cvss_score,
      tp.asset_last_seen,
      tp.exposure_score,
      tp.os,
      tp.open_ports,
      tp.services,
      tp.asm_last_seen,
      tp.asm_severity,
      NULL::boolean as has_exploit,
      NULL::numeric as epss_score,
      NULL as wiz_severity,
      NULL as package_name,
      NULL as provider,
      NULL as region,
      NULL as resource_type,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.cisa_kev ck WHERE ck.cve_id = tp.cve_id\) as in_cisa_kev,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam WHERE \(ipam.hostname = tp.hostname OR ipam.ip_address = tp.ip_address\) AND \(ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%MGMT%' OR ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%OOB%'\)\) as in_mgmt_subnet,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam WHERE \(ipam.hostname = tp.hostname OR ipam.ip_address = tp.ip_address\) AND ipam.is_gateway = true\) as is_gateway,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.vt_results vt WHERE \(vt.target = tp.hostname OR vt.target = tp.ip_address\) AND vt.malicious >= 5\) as is_vt_malicious,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.wiz_vulnerabilities wv2 JOIN public.wiz_inventory wi2 ON wv2.resource_id = wi2.id WHERE wv2.cve_id = tp.cve_id AND \(wi2.name = tp.hostname OR wi2.ip_addresses::text LIKE '%' || tp.ip_address || '%'\)\) as also_in_wiz
    FROM tenable_public tp

    UNION ALL

    -- Wiz public assets
    SELECT
      wp.cve_id,
      wp.hostname,
      wp.ip_address,
      wp.source,
      wp.cvss_score,
      wp.asset_last_seen,
      wp.exposure_score,
      wp.os,
      wp.open_ports,
      NULL as services,
      NULL as asm_last_seen,
      NULL as asm_severity,
      wp.has_exploit,
      wp.epss_score,
      wp.severity as wiz_severity,
      wp.package_name,
      wp.provider,
      wp.region,
      wp.native_type as resource_type,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.cisa_kev ck WHERE ck.cve_id = wp.cve_id\) as in_cisa_kev,
      false as in_mgmt_subnet,
      false as is_gateway,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.vt_results vt WHERE \(vt.target = wp.hostname OR vt.target = wp.ip_address\) AND vt.malicious >= 5\) as is_vt_malicious,
      false as also_in_wiz
    FROM wiz_public wp
  \)
SELECT
  c.cve_id,
  ck.vulnerability_name,
  c.hostname,
  c.ip_address,
  c.source,
  COALESCE\(c.cvss_score::text, 'N/A'\) as cvss,
  c.wiz_severity,
  c.in_cisa_kev,
  c.open_ports,
  c.services,
  c.asm_severity,
  c.has_exploit,
  ROUND\(c.epss_score::numeric, 4\) as epss,
  c.package_name,
  c.provider,
  c.region,
  c.resource_type,
  c.also_in_wiz,
  c.in_mgmt_subnet,
  c.is_gateway,
  c.is_vt_malicious,
  c.asset_last_seen::date,
  \(
    COALESCE\(c.cvss_score, 0\) +
    \(CASE WHEN c.in_cisa_kev THEN 100 ELSE 0 END\) +
    50 + -- all are confirmed public
    \(CASE WHEN c.in_mgmt_subnet THEN 30 ELSE 0 END\) +
    \(CASE WHEN c.is_gateway THEN 20 ELSE 0 END\) +
    \(CASE WHEN c.is_vt_malicious THEN 50 ELSE 0 END\) +
    \(CASE WHEN c.also_in_wiz THEN 20 ELSE 0 END\) +
    \(CASE WHEN c.has_exploit THEN 20 ELSE 0 END\)
  \) as priority_score
FROM combined c
LEFT JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON c.cve_id = ck.cve_id
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, c.cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 15;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
WITH
  -- Assets confirmed active in Tenable AND visible in ASM with open ports \(direct public access\)
  public_assets AS \(
    SELECT
      ta.id as asset_id,
      ta.ipv4 as ip_address,
      ta.hostname,
      ta.last_seen as tenable_last_seen,
      ta.exposure_score,
      ta.os,
      STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CAST\(asm.port AS TEXT\) || '/' || COALESCE\(asm.service, '?'\), ', '\) as exposed_ports,
      MAX\(asm.last_seen\) as asm_last_seen,
      STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT asm.severity_ranking, ', '\) as asm_severity
    FROM public.tenable_assets ta
    JOIN public.tenable_asm_assets asm
      ON \(asm.ip_address = ta.ipv4 OR asm.hostname = ta.hostname\)
    WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
      AND asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'
      AND asm.port IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ta.id, ta.ipv4, ta.hostname, ta.last_seen, ta.exposure_score, ta.os
  \),
  -- Vuln findings for those public assets
  findings AS \(
    SELECT
      pa.ip_address,
      pa.hostname,
      pa.tenable_last_seen,
      pa.exposure_score,
      pa.os,
      pa.exposed_ports,
      pa.asm_last_seen,
      pa.asm_severity,
      tf.cve as cve_id,
      tf.cvss_score,
      ck.vulnerability_name,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.cisa_kev ck2 WHERE ck2.cve_id = tf.cve\) as in_cisa_kev,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam WHERE \(ipam.hostname = pa.hostname OR ipam.ip_address = pa.ip_address\) AND \(ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%MGMT%' OR ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%OOB%'\)\) as in_mgmt_subnet,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam WHERE \(ipam.hostname = pa.hostname OR ipam.ip_address = pa.ip_address\) AND ipam.is_gateway = true\) as is_gateway,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.vt_results vt WHERE \(vt.target = pa.hostname OR vt.target = pa.ip_address\) AND vt.malicious >= 5\) as is_vt_malicious
    FROM public_assets pa
    JOIN public.tenable_findings tf ON tf.asset_id = pa.asset_id
    LEFT JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = tf.cve
  \)
SELECT
  f.ip_address,
  f.hostname,
  f.cve_id,
  f.vulnerability_name,
  COALESCE\(f.cvss_score::text, 'N/A'\) as cvss,
  f.in_cisa_kev,
  f.in_mgmt_subnet,
  f.is_gateway,
  f.is_vt_malicious,
  f.asm_severity,
  f.exposed_ports,
  f.os,
  f.exposure_score,
  f.asm_last_seen::date,
  f.tenable_last_seen::date,
  \(
    COALESCE\(f.cvss_score, 0\) +
    \(CASE WHEN f.in_cisa_kev THEN 100 ELSE 0 END\) +
    50 +
    \(CASE WHEN f.in_mgmt_subnet THEN 30 ELSE 0 END\) +
    \(CASE WHEN f.is_gateway THEN 20 ELSE 0 END\) +
    \(CASE WHEN f.is_vt_malicious THEN 50 ELSE 0 END\)
  \) as priority_score
FROM findings f
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, f.cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST, f.ip_address
LIMIT 15;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
WITH
  -- Deduplicated public assets \(one row per IP\)
  public_asset_ips AS \(
    SELECT DISTINCT
      ta.ipv4 as ip_address,
      MAX\(ta.hostname\) as hostname,
      MAX\(ta.last_seen\) as tenable_last_seen,
      MAX\(ta.exposure_score\) as exposure_score,
      MAX\(ta.os\) as os,
      STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CAST\(asm.port AS TEXT\) || '/' || COALESCE\(asm.service,'?'\), ', '\) as exposed_ports,
      MAX\(asm.last_seen\) as asm_last_seen,
      MIN\(asm.severity_ranking\) as asm_severity
    FROM public.tenable_assets ta
    JOIN public.tenable_asm_assets asm
      ON \(asm.ip_address = ta.ipv4 OR asm.hostname = ta.hostname\)
    WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
      AND asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'
      AND asm.port IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ta.ipv4
  \),
  -- Top CVE per IP \(deduplicated, max cvss\)
  top_vulns AS \(
    SELECT DISTINCT ON \(pai.ip_address, tf.cve\)
      pai.ip_address,
      pai.hostname,
      pai.exposed_ports,
      pai.asm_severity,
      pai.exposure_score,
      pai.os,
      pai.asm_last_seen,
      pai.tenable_last_seen,
      tf.cve as cve_id,
      tf.cvss_score,
      ck.vulnerability_name,
      \(tf.cvss_score IS NOT NULL\) as has_cvss,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.cisa_kev ck2 WHERE ck2.cve_id = tf.cve\) as in_cisa_kev,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam WHERE \(ipam.hostname = pai.hostname OR ipam.ip_address = pai.ip_address\) AND \(ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%MGMT%' OR ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%OOB%'\)\) as in_mgmt_subnet,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam WHERE \(ipam.hostname = pai.hostname OR ipam.ip_address = pai.ip_address\) AND ipam.is_gateway = true\) as is_gateway
    FROM public_asset_ips pai
    JOIN public.tenable_assets ta ON ta.ipv4 = pai.ip_address
    JOIN public.tenable_findings tf ON tf.asset_id = ta.id
    LEFT JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = tf.cve
  \)
SELECT
  tv.ip_address,
  tv.hostname,
  tv.cve_id,
  tv.vulnerability_name,
  COALESCE\(tv.cvss_score::text, 'N/A'\) as cvss,
  tv.in_cisa_kev,
  tv.in_mgmt_subnet,
  tv.is_gateway,
  tv.asm_severity,
  tv.exposed_ports,
  tv.os,
  tv.exposure_score,
  tv.asm_last_seen::date,
  tv.tenable_last_seen::date,
  \(
    COALESCE\(tv.cvss_score, 0\) +
    \(CASE WHEN tv.in_cisa_kev THEN 100 ELSE 0 END\) +
    50 +
    \(CASE WHEN tv.in_mgmt_subnet THEN 30 ELSE 0 END\) +
    \(CASE WHEN tv.is_gateway THEN 20 ELSE 0 END\)
  \) as priority_score
FROM top_vulns tv
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, tv.cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST, tv.ip_address
LIMIT 20;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
-- Asset-level view: all public-facing active assets with vuln counts and top risk factors
WITH public_asset_ips AS \(
  SELECT DISTINCT
    ta.ipv4 as ip_address,
    MAX\(ta.hostname\) as hostname,
    MAX\(ta.last_seen\) as tenable_last_seen,
    MAX\(ta.exposure_score\) as exposure_score,
    MAX\(ta.os\) as os,
    STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CAST\(asm.port AS TEXT\) || '/' || COALESCE\(asm.service,'?'\), ', '\) as exposed_ports,
    MAX\(asm.last_seen\) as asm_last_seen,
    MIN\(asm.severity_ranking\) as asm_severity
  FROM public.tenable_assets ta
  JOIN public.tenable_asm_assets asm ON \(asm.ip_address = ta.ipv4 OR asm.hostname = ta.hostname\)
  WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
    AND asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND asm.port IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY ta.ipv4
\),
vuln_summary AS \(
  SELECT
    pai.ip_address,
    pai.hostname,
    pai.exposed_ports,
    pai.asm_severity,
    pai.exposure_score,
    pai.os,
    pai.asm_last_seen::date,
    pai.tenable_last_seen::date,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT tf.cve\) as total_cves,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN tf.cve END\) as kev_cves,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tf.cvss_score >= 9 THEN tf.cve END\) as critical_cves,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tf.cvss_score >= 7 AND tf.cvss_score < 9 THEN tf.cve END\) as high_cves,
    MAX\(tf.cvss_score\) as max_cvss,
    STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN tf.cve END, ', '\) as kev_cve_list
  FROM public_asset_ips pai
  JOIN public.tenable_assets ta ON ta.ipv4 = pai.ip_address
  JOIN public.tenable_findings tf ON tf.asset_id = ta.id
  LEFT JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = tf.cve
  GROUP BY pai.ip_address, pai.hostname, pai.exposed_ports, pai.asm_severity,
           pai.exposure_score, pai.os, pai.asm_last_seen, pai.tenable_last_seen
\)
SELECT
  ip_address,
  hostname,
  total_cves,
  kev_cves,
  critical_cves,
  high_cves,
  COALESCE\(max_cvss::text, 'N/A'\) as max_cvss,
  asm_severity,
  exposed_ports,
  os,
  exposure_score,
  asm_last_seen,
  tenable_last_seen,
  kev_cve_list,
  \(
    COALESCE\(max_cvss, 0\) +
    \(kev_cves * 100\) +
    50 +
    \(critical_cves * 2\) +
    \(high_cves * 1\)
  \) as priority_score
FROM vuln_summary
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, kev_cves DESC, total_cves DESC
LIMIT 20;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
-- Check if 192.168.1.100 is in ASM
SELECT ip_address, hostname, port, service, severity_ranking, last_seen::date
FROM public.tenable_asm_assets
WHERE ip_address = '192.168.1.100' OR hostname ILIKE '%192.168.1.100%'
LIMIT 10;

-- Also check how 192.168.1.100 appears in tenable_assets
SELECT id, ipv4, hostname, last_seen::date, exposure_score FROM public.tenable_assets WHERE ipv4 = '192.168.1.100' LIMIT 5;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
WITH public_asset_ips AS \(
  SELECT DISTINCT
    ta.ipv4 as ip_address,
    MAX\(ta.hostname\) as hostname,
    MAX\(ta.last_seen\) as tenable_last_seen,
    MAX\(ta.exposure_score\) as exposure_score,
    MAX\(ta.os\) as os,
    COALESCE\(
      STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN asm.port IS NOT NULL THEN CAST\(asm.port AS TEXT\) || '/' || COALESCE\(asm.service,'?'\) END, ', '\),
      'No port data'
    \) as exposed_ports,
    MAX\(asm.last_seen\) as asm_last_seen,
    MIN\(asm.severity_ranking\) as asm_severity
  FROM public.tenable_assets ta
  JOIN public.tenable_asm_assets asm ON \(asm.ip_address = ta.ipv4 OR asm.hostname = ta.hostname\)
  WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
    AND asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY ta.ipv4
\),
vuln_summary AS \(
  SELECT
    pai.ip_address,
    pai.hostname,
    pai.exposed_ports,
    pai.asm_severity,
    pai.exposure_score,
    pai.os,
    pai.asm_last_seen::date as asm_last_seen,
    pai.tenable_last_seen::date as tenable_last_seen,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT tf.cve\) as total_cves,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN tf.cve END\) as kev_cves,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tf.cvss_score >= 9 THEN tf.cve END\) as critical_cves,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tf.cvss_score >= 7 AND tf.cvss_score < 9 THEN tf.cve END\) as high_cves,
    MAX\(tf.cvss_score\) as max_cvss,
    STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN tf.cve || ' \(' || COALESCE\(ck.vulnerability_name,''\) || '\)' END, ' | '\) as kev_findings
  FROM public_asset_ips pai
  JOIN public.tenable_assets ta ON ta.ipv4 = pai.ip_address
  JOIN public.tenable_findings tf ON tf.asset_id = ta.id
  LEFT JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = tf.cve
  GROUP BY pai.ip_address, pai.hostname, pai.exposed_ports, pai.asm_severity,
           pai.exposure_score, pai.os, pai.asm_last_seen, pai.tenable_last_seen
\)
SELECT
  ip_address,
  hostname,
  total_cves,
  kev_cves,
  critical_cves,
  high_cves,
  COALESCE\(max_cvss::text,'N/A'\) as max_cvss,
  exposure_score,
  asm_severity,
  exposed_ports,
  os,
  asm_last_seen,
  tenable_last_seen,
  \(
    COALESCE\(max_cvss, 0\) +
    \(kev_cves * 100\) +
    50 +
    \(critical_cves * 2\) +
    \(high_cves * 1\) +
    \(CASE WHEN exposure_score > 500 THEN 30 WHEN exposure_score > 200 THEN 15 ELSE 0 END\)
  \) as priority_score,
  kev_findings
FROM vuln_summary
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, kev_cves DESC, total_cves DESC
LIMIT 15;" 2>&1)
Bash(npx --version)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
-- Match Wiz inventory against ASM by IP address
WITH wiz_ips AS \(
  SELECT
    wi.id as wiz_id,
    wi.name as wiz_name,
    wi.type as wiz_type,
    wi.provider,
    wi.region,
    wi.status,
    wi.has_public_ip,
    wi.last_seen::date as wiz_last_seen,
    unnest\(wi.ip_addresses\) as ip
  FROM public.wiz_inventory wi
  WHERE wi.ip_addresses IS NOT NULL
    AND array_length\(wi.ip_addresses, 1\) > 0
    AND wi.status = 'Active'
    AND wi.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
\)
SELECT
  w.ip,
  w.wiz_name,
  w.wiz_type,
  w.provider,
  w.region,
  w.has_public_ip,
  w.wiz_last_seen,
  asm.hostname as asm_hostname,
  asm.port,
  asm.service,
  asm.severity_ranking as asm_severity,
  asm.last_seen::date as asm_last_seen,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT wv.cve_id\) as wiz_vuln_count,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wv.asset_has_wide_internet_exposure THEN wv.cve_id END\) as wiz_internet_exposed_vulns
FROM wiz_ips w
JOIN public.tenable_asm_assets asm ON asm.ip_address = w.ip
LEFT JOIN public.wiz_vulnerabilities wv ON wv.resource_id = w.wiz_id
  AND wv.status NOT IN \('RESOLVED','REJECTED'\)
WHERE asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY w.ip, w.wiz_name, w.wiz_type, w.provider, w.region, w.has_public_ip,
         w.wiz_last_seen, asm.hostname, asm.port, asm.service, asm.severity_ranking, asm.last_seen
ORDER BY wiz_vuln_count DESC, asm.severity_ranking, w.ip
LIMIT 50;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
-- Unique matched assets summary \(deduplicated by Wiz resource + IP\)
WITH wiz_ips AS \(
  SELECT
    wi.id as wiz_id,
    wi.name as wiz_name,
    wi.type as wiz_type,
    wi.provider,
    wi.region,
    wi.subscription_name,
    wi.status,
    wi.has_public_ip,
    wi.last_seen::date as wiz_last_seen,
    unnest\(wi.ip_addresses\) as ip
  FROM public.wiz_inventory wi
  WHERE wi.ip_addresses IS NOT NULL
    AND array_length\(wi.ip_addresses, 1\) > 0
    AND wi.status = 'Active'
    AND wi.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
\),
matched AS \(
  SELECT DISTINCT
    w.ip,
    w.wiz_name,
    w.wiz_type,
    w.provider,
    w.region,
    w.subscription_name,
    w.has_public_ip,
    w.wiz_last_seen,
    STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT asm.hostname, ', '\) as asm_hostnames,
    STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CAST\(asm.port AS TEXT\) || '/' || COALESCE\(asm.service,'?'\), ', '\) FILTER \(WHERE asm.port IS NOT NULL\) as exposed_ports,
    MIN\(asm.severity_ranking\) as asm_severity,
    MAX\(asm.last_seen\)::date as asm_last_seen,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT wv.cve_id\) as wiz_vuln_count,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wv.severity IN \('CRITICAL','HIGH'\) THEN wv.cve_id END\) as wiz_critical_high,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN wv.cve_id END\) as wiz_kev_count,
    MAX\(wv.cvss_score\) as max_cvss,
    STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN wv.cve_id END, ', '\) as kev_cves
  FROM wiz_ips w
  JOIN public.tenable_asm_assets asm ON asm.ip_address = w.ip
  LEFT JOIN public.wiz_vulnerabilities wv ON wv.resource_id = w.wiz_id
    AND wv.status NOT IN \('RESOLVED','REJECTED'\)
  LEFT JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = wv.cve_id
  WHERE asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY w.ip, w.wiz_name, w.wiz_type, w.provider, w.region, w.subscription_name,
           w.has_public_ip, w.wiz_last_seen
\)
SELECT
  ip,
  wiz_name,
  wiz_type,
  provider,
  region,
  subscription_name,
  has_public_ip,
  wiz_last_seen,
  asm_hostnames,
  exposed_ports,
  asm_severity,
  asm_last_seen,
  wiz_vuln_count,
  wiz_critical_high,
  wiz_kev_count,
  COALESCE\(max_cvss::text,'N/A'\) as max_cvss,
  kev_cves,
  \(
    COALESCE\(max_cvss, 0\) +
    \(wiz_kev_count * 100\) +
    50 +
    \(wiz_critical_high * 5\)
  \) as priority_score
FROM matched
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, wiz_vuln_count DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
SELECT 'wiz_inventory' as source, id, name, type, provider, region, status,
       ip_addresses::text, has_public_ip, last_seen::date
FROM public.wiz_inventory
WHERE name ILIKE '%terminal%'

UNION ALL

SELECT 'tenable_assets', id::text, hostname, system_type, NULL, NULL, NULL,
       ipv4, NULL, last_seen::date
FROM public.tenable_assets
WHERE hostname ILIKE '%terminal%'

UNION ALL

SELECT 'tenable_asm', id, hostname, type, NULL, NULL, NULL,
       ip_address, NULL, last_seen::date
FROM public.tenable_asm_assets
WHERE hostname ILIKE '%terminal%'

ORDER BY source, name;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' -c "
WITH
  -- Tenable findings with owner info from tags and phpIPAM
  tenable_vulns AS \(
    SELECT
      ta.ipv4 as ip_address,
      ta.hostname,
      tf.cve as cve_id,
      tf.cvss_score,
      'Tenable' as source,
      ta.os,
      ta.last_seen::date as asset_last_seen,
      -- Extract BU/owner from Tenable tags
      \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t
       WHERE t->>'key' ILIKE '%owner%' OR t->>'key' ILIKE '%BU%' OR t->>'key' ILIKE '%department%'
       LIMIT 1\) as tenable_tag_owner,
      -- phpIPAM owner info
      ipam.owner as ipam_owner,
      ipam.point_of_contact as ipam_poc,
      ipam.subnet_owner,
      ipam.subnet_description,
      -- ASM presence
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.tenable_asm_assets asm
              WHERE \(asm.ip_address = ta.ipv4 OR asm.hostname = ta.hostname\)
              AND asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'\) as in_asm,
      -- CISA KEV
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.cisa_kev ck WHERE ck.cve_id = tf.cve\) as in_cisa_kev,
      -- Management subnet
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets i2
              WHERE \(i2.hostname = ta.hostname OR i2.ip_address = ta.ipv4\)
              AND \(i2.subnet_description ILIKE '%MGMT%' OR i2.subnet_description ILIKE '%OOB%'\)\) as in_mgmt_subnet,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets i3
              WHERE \(i3.hostname = ta.hostname OR i3.ip_address = ta.ipv4\)
              AND i3.is_gateway = true\) as is_gateway
    FROM public.tenable_findings tf
    JOIN public.tenable_assets ta ON tf.asset_id = ta.id
    LEFT JOIN public.phpipam_assets ipam ON \(ipam.ip_address = ta.ipv4 OR ipam.hostname = ta.hostname\)
    WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
  \),
  -- Wiz findings with owner info from tags
  wiz_vulns AS \(
    SELECT
      wi.ip_addresses[1] as ip_address,
      wi.name as hostname,
      wv.cve_id,
      wv.cvss_score,
      'Wiz' as source,
      wi.native_type as os,
      wi.last_seen::date as asset_last_seen,
      -- Extract owner from Wiz tags
      COALESCE\(wi.tags->>'owner', wi.tags->>'Owner'\) as wiz_owner,
      COALESCE\(wi.tags->>'bu', wi.tags->>'BU', wi.tags->>'department'\) as wiz_bu,
      wi.tags->>'product' as wiz_product,
      wi.tags->>'environment' as wiz_env,
      wi.subscription_name,
      wi.provider,
      wi.region,
      wv.severity as wiz_severity,
      wv.has_exploit,
      wv.epss_score,
      wv.package_name,
      -- phpIPAM match
      \(SELECT ipam.owner FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam
       WHERE ipam.ip_address = wi.ip_addresses[1] LIMIT 1\) as ipam_owner,
      \(SELECT ipam.point_of_contact FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam
       WHERE ipam.ip_address = wi.ip_addresses[1] LIMIT 1\) as ipam_poc,
      EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM public.cisa_kev ck WHERE ck.cve_id = wv.cve_id\) as in_cisa_kev,
      \(wv.asset_has_wide_internet_exposure OR wv.asset_has_limited_internet_exposure\) as in_asm,
      false as in_mgmt_subnet,
      false as is_gateway
    FROM public.wiz_vulnerabilities wv
    JOIN public.wiz_inventory wi ON wv.resource_id = wi.id
    WHERE wi.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
      AND wv.status NOT IN \('RESOLVED','REJECTED'\)
      AND wi.status != 'deleted'
  \),
  -- Combined with scoring
  combined AS \(
    SELECT
      ip_address, hostname, cve_id, cvss_score, source, os, asset_last_seen,
      COALESCE\(tenable_tag_owner, ipam_owner\) as owner,
      COALESCE\(ipam_poc, tenable_tag_owner\) as contact,
      COALESCE\(subnet_description, ipam_owner\) as department,
      in_asm, in_cisa_kev, in_mgmt_subnet, is_gateway,
      NULL as wiz_severity, NULL::boolean as has_exploit,
      NULL::numeric as epss_score, NULL as package_name,
      NULL as wiz_bu, NULL as wiz_product, NULL as wiz_env, NULL as subscription_name, NULL as provider, NULL as region
    FROM tenable_vulns

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
      ip_address, hostname, cve_id, cvss_score, source, os, asset_last_seen,
      COALESCE\(wiz_owner, ipam_owner\) as owner,
      COALESCE\(ipam_poc, wiz_owner\) as contact,
      COALESCE\(wiz_bu, subscription_name\) as department,
      in_asm, in_cisa_kev, in_mgmt_subnet, is_gateway,
      wiz_severity, has_exploit, epss_score, package_name,
      wiz_bu, wiz_product, wiz_env, subscription_name, provider, region
    FROM wiz_vulns
  \),
  -- Deduplicate and score per asset+CVE
  scored AS \(
    SELECT DISTINCT ON \(ip_address, hostname, cve_id\)
      ip_address, hostname, cve_id, source,
      MAX\(cvss_score\) OVER \(PARTITION BY ip_address, hostname, cve_id\) as cvss_score,
      os, asset_last_seen,
      COALESCE\(owner, 'Unknown'\) as owner,
      COALESCE\(contact, COALESCE\(owner, 'Unknown'\)\) as contact,
      COALESCE\(department, 'Unknown'\) as department,
      in_asm, in_cisa_kev, in_mgmt_subnet, is_gateway,
      wiz_severity, has_exploit, epss_score, package_name,
      wiz_bu, wiz_product, wiz_env, subscription_name, provider, region,
      \(
        COALESCE\(cvss_score, 0\) +
        \(CASE WHEN in_cisa_kev THEN 100 ELSE 0 END\) +
        \(CASE WHEN in_asm THEN 50 ELSE 0 END\) +
        \(CASE WHEN in_mgmt_subnet THEN 30 ELSE 0 END\) +
        \(CASE WHEN is_gateway THEN 20 ELSE 0 END\) +
        \(CASE WHEN has_exploit THEN 20 ELSE 0 END\)
      \) as priority_score
    FROM combined
    ORDER BY ip_address, hostname, cve_id, priority_score DESC
  \)
SELECT
  cve_id,
  \(SELECT vulnerability_name FROM public.cisa_kev WHERE cve_id = s.cve_id LIMIT 1\) as vuln_name,
  ip_address,
  hostname,
  source,
  COALESCE\(cvss_score::text, 'N/A'\) as cvss,
  wiz_severity,
  in_cisa_kev,
  in_asm,
  in_mgmt_subnet,
  is_gateway,
  has_exploit,
  ROUND\(epss_score::numeric, 4\) as epss,
  owner,
  contact,
  department,
  wiz_bu,
  wiz_product,
  wiz_env,
  subscription_name,
  provider,
  region,
  asset_last_seen,
  priority_score
FROM scored s
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
SELECT
  tf.cve as cve_id,
  ck.vulnerability_name,
  ta.ipv4 as ip_address,
  ta.hostname,
  COALESCE\(tf.cvss_score::text,'N/A'\) as cvss,
  ta.os,
  COALESCE\(ipam.owner,'Unknown'\) as ipam_owner,
  COALESCE\(ipam.point_of_contact,'Unknown'\) as ipam_poc,
  COALESCE\(ipam.subnet_owner,'Unknown'\) as subnet_owner,
  COALESCE\(ipam.subnet_description,'Unknown'\) as subnet,
  ipam.is_gateway,
  EXISTS\(SELECT 1 FROM public.tenable_asm_assets asm WHERE asm.ip_address = ta.ipv4 AND asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\)-INTERVAL '30 days'\) as public_facing,
  ta.last_seen::date,
  \(COALESCE\(tf.cvss_score,0\) + 100 + 50 +
   CASE WHEN ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%MGMT%' OR ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%OOB%' THEN 30 ELSE 0 END +
   CASE WHEN ipam.is_gateway THEN 20 ELSE 0 END\) as priority_score
FROM public.tenable_findings tf
JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = tf.cve
JOIN public.tenable_assets ta ON tf.asset_id = ta.id
LEFT JOIN public.phpipam_assets ipam ON ipam.ip_address = ta.ipv4
WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, tf.cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 15;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
-- Wiz top findings with owner tags
SELECT
  wv.cve_id,
  ck.vulnerability_name,
  wi.name as resource_name,
  wi.provider,
  wi.region,
  wi.native_type as resource_type,
  wi.subscription_name,
  COALESCE\(wi.tags->>'owner', wi.tags->>'Owner','Unknown'\) as owner,
  COALESCE\(wi.tags->>'bu', wi.tags->>'BU','Unknown'\) as bu,
  COALESCE\(wi.tags->>'product','Unknown'\) as product,
  COALESCE\(wi.tags->>'environment','Unknown'\) as environment,
  wv.severity,
  COALESCE\(wv.cvss_score::text,'N/A'\) as cvss,
  wv.has_exploit,
  ROUND\(wv.epss_score::numeric,4\) as epss,
  wv.package_name,
  wv.asset_has_wide_internet_exposure as wide_internet,
  wi.last_seen::date,
  \(
    COALESCE\(wv.cvss_score,0\) +
    CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN 100 ELSE 0 END +
    CASE WHEN wv.asset_has_wide_internet_exposure THEN 50 ELSE 0 END +
    CASE WHEN wv.has_exploit THEN 20 ELSE 0 END
  \) as priority_score
FROM public.wiz_vulnerabilities wv
JOIN public.wiz_inventory wi ON wv.resource_id = wi.id
LEFT JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = wv.cve_id
WHERE wi.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND wi.status != 'deleted'
  AND wv.status NOT IN \('RESOLVED','REJECTED'\)
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, wv.cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 15;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c ":*)
Bash(__NEW_LINE_b0172f2925921b86__ PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c ":*)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
WITH dto_assets AS \(
  SELECT DISTINCT
    ta.id as asset_id,
    ta.ipv4 as ip_address,
    ta.hostname,
    ta.os,
    ta.last_seen::date as last_seen,
    ta.exposure_score,
    -- Named owner from DTO_On_Prem_Citrix tag
    \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t
     WHERE t->>'key' = 'DTO_On_Prem_Citrix' LIMIT 1\) as dto_owner,
    -- Batch grouping
    \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t
     WHERE t->>'key' = 'Assets in DTO Only' LIMIT 1\) as dto_batch,
    -- IP address group
    \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t
     WHERE t->>'key' = 'DTO_IP_Addresses' LIMIT 1\) as dto_ip_group
  FROM public.tenable_assets ta
  WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
    AND EXISTS \(
      SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t
      WHERE t->>'key' ILIKE '%DTO%'
    \)
\),
dto_vulns AS \(
  SELECT
    da.ip_address,
    da.hostname,
    da.os,
    da.last_seen,
    da.exposure_score,
    COALESCE\(da.dto_owner, da.dto_batch, 'DTO - No Owner Tagged'\) as owner,
    da.dto_batch,
    da.dto_ip_group,
    tf.cve as cve_id,
    tf.cvss_score,
    ck.vulnerability_name,
    ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL as in_kev,
    EXISTS\(SELECT 1 FROM public.tenable_asm_assets asm
           WHERE \(asm.ip_address = da.ip_address OR asm.hostname = da.hostname\)
           AND asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'\) as in_asm,
    EXISTS\(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam
           WHERE \(ipam.ip_address = da.ip_address OR ipam.hostname = da.hostname\)
           AND \(ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%MGMT%' OR ipam.subnet_description ILIKE '%OOB%'\)\) as in_mgmt,
    EXISTS\(SELECT 1 FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam
           WHERE \(ipam.ip_address = da.ip_address OR ipam.hostname = da.hostname\)
           AND ipam.is_gateway = true\) as is_gateway,
    \(SELECT ipam.subnet_description FROM public.phpipam_assets ipam
     WHERE ipam.ip_address = da.ip_address LIMIT 1\) as subnet
  FROM dto_assets da
  JOIN public.tenable_findings tf ON tf.asset_id = da.asset_id
  LEFT JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = tf.cve
\),
scored AS \(
  SELECT DISTINCT ON \(ip_address, cve_id\)
    ip_address, hostname, os, last_seen, exposure_score, owner, dto_batch, subnet,
    cve_id, cvss_score, vulnerability_name, in_kev, in_asm, in_mgmt, is_gateway,
    \(
      COALESCE\(cvss_score, 0\) +
      CASE WHEN in_kev   THEN 100 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN in_asm   THEN 50  ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN in_mgmt  THEN 30  ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN is_gateway THEN 20 ELSE 0 END
    \) as priority_score
  FROM dto_vulns
  ORDER BY ip_address, cve_id, priority_score DESC
\)
SELECT
  priority_score,
  cve_id,
  vulnerability_name,
  ip_address,
  hostname,
  COALESCE\(cvss_score::text,'N/A'\) as cvss,
  in_kev,
  in_asm,
  in_mgmt,
  is_gateway,
  owner,
  subnet,
  os,
  exposure_score,
  last_seen
FROM scored
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST, owner
LIMIT 40;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as dto_asset_count
FROM public.tenable_assets ta
WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND EXISTS \(
    SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t
    WHERE t->>'key' ILIKE '%DTO%'
  \);" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
WITH dto_owners AS \(
  SELECT
    ta.id as asset_id,
    ta.ipv4 as ip_address,
    ta.hostname,
    ta.exposure_score,
    ta.last_seen::date as last_seen,
    \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t WHERE t->>'key' = 'DTO_On_Prem_Citrix' LIMIT 1\) as dto_owner,
    \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t WHERE t->>'key' = 'Assets in DTO Only' LIMIT 1\) as dto_batch
  FROM public.tenable_assets ta
  WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
    AND EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t WHERE t->>'key' ILIKE '%DTO%'\)
\),
kev_hits AS \(
  SELECT
    do2.ip_address,
    do2.hostname,
    do2.exposure_score,
    do2.last_seen,
    COALESCE\(do2.dto_owner, do2.dto_batch, 'DTO - Unassigned'\) as owner,
    tf.cve as cve_id,
    tf.cvss_score,
    ck.vulnerability_name
  FROM dto_owners do2
  JOIN public.tenable_findings tf ON tf.asset_id = do2.asset_id
  JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = tf.cve
\),
asm_ips AS \(
  SELECT DISTINCT ip_address FROM public.tenable_asm_assets
  WHERE last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days' AND ip_address IS NOT NULL
\)
SELECT
  100 + COALESCE\(kh.cvss_score, 0\) as priority_score,
  kh.cve_id,
  kh.vulnerability_name,
  kh.ip_address,
  kh.hostname,
  COALESCE\(kh.cvss_score::text, 'N/A'\) as cvss,
  kh.owner,
  kh.exposure_score,
  kh.last_seen,
  CASE WHEN a.ip_address IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'no' END as externally_visible
FROM kev_hits kh
LEFT JOIN asm_ips a ON a.ip_address = kh.ip_address
ORDER BY priority_score DESC, kh.cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST, kh.owner
LIMIT 30;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
SELECT 
  t->>'key' as tag_key,
  t->>'value' as tag_value,
  COUNT\(*\) as asset_count
FROM public.tenable_assets ta,
     jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t
WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND t->>'key' ILIKE '%DTO%'
GROUP BY t->>'key', t->>'value'
ORDER BY t->>'key', asset_count DESC
LIMIT 30;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
SELECT 
  t->>'key' as tag_key,
  t->>'value' as tag_value,
  COUNT\(*\) as asset_count
FROM public.tenable_assets ta,
     jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t
WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND t->>'key' = 'DTO_On_Prem_Citrix'
GROUP BY t->>'key', t->>'value'
ORDER BY asset_count DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
WITH dto_named AS \(
  SELECT
    ta.id as asset_id,
    ta.ipv4 as ip_address,
    ta.hostname,
    ta.exposure_score,
    ta.last_seen::date as last_seen,
    COALESCE\(
      \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t WHERE t->>'key' = 'DTO_On_Prem_Citrix' LIMIT 1\),
      \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t WHERE t->>'key' = 'Assets in DTO Only' LIMIT 1\),
      'DTO - Unassigned'
    \) as owner
  FROM public.tenable_assets ta
  WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
    AND EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t WHERE t->>'key' ILIKE '%DTO%'\)
\)
SELECT
  dn.owner,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT dn.asset_id\) as total_assets,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN dn.asset_id END\) as assets_with_kev,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN tf.cve END\) as unique_kev_cves,
  STRING_AGG\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN tf.cve END, ', ' ORDER BY CASE WHEN ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL THEN tf.cve END\) as kev_cves
FROM dto_named dn
JOIN public.tenable_findings tf ON tf.asset_id = dn.asset_id
LEFT JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = tf.cve
WHERE ck.cve_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY dn.owner
ORDER BY assets_with_kev DESC, unique_kev_cves DESC
LIMIT 25;" 2>&1)
Bash(DB_PASSWORD=csg2025 node scripts/generate_dto_report.cjs)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
SELECT
  ta.ipv4, ta.hostname, ta.os, ta.last_seen::date, ta.exposure_score,
  \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t WHERE t->>'key' = 'DTO_On_Prem_Citrix' LIMIT 1\) as dto_owner,
  \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t WHERE t->>'key' = 'Assets in DTO Only' LIMIT 1\) as dto_batch
FROM public.tenable_assets ta
WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND \(
    ta.hostname ILIKE '%netscaler%'
    OR ta.hostname ILIKE '%adc%'
    OR ta.hostname ILIKE '%citrix%'
    OR ta.os ILIKE '%netscaler%'
    OR ta.os ILIKE '%citrix%'
  \)
ORDER BY ta.exposure_score DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
-- Search broader terms and check what OS values exist for Citrix-related assets
SELECT DISTINCT ta.os, COUNT\(*\) as count
FROM public.tenable_assets ta
WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND \(ta.os ILIKE '%citrix%' OR ta.os ILIKE '%netscal%' OR ta.os ILIKE '%adc%' OR ta.os ILIKE '%gateway%'\)
GROUP BY ta.os
ORDER BY count DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
-- Full count + version breakdown + KEV CVEs on NetScalers
SELECT
  array_to_string\(ta.operating_systems, ', '\) as version,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT ta.ipv4\) as device_count
FROM public.tenable_assets ta
WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM unnest\(ta.operating_systems\) o WHERE o ILIKE '%netscal%' OR o ILIKE '%citrix%'\)
GROUP BY version
ORDER BY device_count DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
-- KEV vulnerabilities on NetScaler devices specifically
WITH netscaler_assets AS \(
  SELECT DISTINCT ta.id, ta.ipv4,
    array_to_string\(ta.operating_systems, ', '\) as version,
    ta.exposure_score,
    ta.last_seen::date as last_seen,
    \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t WHERE t->>'key' = 'DTO_On_Prem_Citrix' LIMIT 1\) as dto_owner,
    \(SELECT t->>'value' FROM jsonb_array_elements\(ta.tags\) t WHERE t->>'key' = 'Assets in DTO Only' LIMIT 1\) as dto_batch
  FROM public.tenable_assets ta
  WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
    AND EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM unnest\(ta.operating_systems\) o WHERE o ILIKE '%netscal%' OR o ILIKE '%citrix%'\)
\)
SELECT
  tf.cve,
  ck.vulnerability_name,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT na.ipv4\) as affected_devices,
  MAX\(tf.cvss_score\) as max_cvss
FROM netscaler_assets na
JOIN public.tenable_findings tf ON tf.asset_id = na.id
JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = tf.cve
GROUP BY tf.cve, ck.vulnerability_name
ORDER BY affected_devices DESC, max_cvss DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
-- NetScaler total count + EOL versions
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN os ILIKE '%11.1%' OR os ILIKE '%12.0%' OR os ILIKE '%12.1%' THEN 'EOL \(11.x/12.x\)'
    WHEN os ILIKE '%13.0%' THEN 'EOL \(13.0\)'
    WHEN os ILIKE '%13.1%' THEN 'Supported \(13.1\)'
    WHEN os ILIKE '%14.1%' THEN 'Supported \(14.1\)'
    WHEN os ILIKE '%ADC 13%' OR os ILIKE '%Netscaler ADC 13%' THEN 'ADC 13.x \(check patch\)'
    ELSE 'Unknown version'
  END as status,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT ta.ipv4\) as device_count
FROM public.tenable_assets ta,
     unnest\(ta.operating_systems\) os
WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND \(os ILIKE '%netscal%' OR os ILIKE '%citrix%'\)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY device_count DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN v ILIKE '%11.1%' OR v ILIKE '%12.0%' OR v ILIKE '%12.1%' THEN 'EOL \(11.x / 12.x\)'
    WHEN v ILIKE '%13.0%' THEN 'EOL \(13.0\)'
    WHEN v ILIKE '%13.1%' THEN 'Supported \(13.1\)'
    WHEN v ILIKE '%14.1%' THEN 'Supported \(14.1\)'
    WHEN v ILIKE '%ADC 13%' THEN 'ADC 13.x \(verify patch level\)'
    ELSE 'Unknown version'
  END as lifecycle_status,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT ta.ipv4\) as device_count
FROM public.tenable_assets ta,
     unnest\(ta.operating_systems\) v
WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND \(v ILIKE '%netscal%' OR v ILIKE '%citrix%'\)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY device_count DESC;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
WITH netscaler_ids AS \(
  SELECT DISTINCT ta.id, ta.ipv4
  FROM public.tenable_assets ta,
       unnest\(ta.operating_systems\) v
  WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
    AND \(v ILIKE '%netscal%' OR v ILIKE '%citrix%'\)
\)
SELECT
  tf.cve,
  ck.vulnerability_name,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT na.ipv4\) as affected_devices,
  MAX\(tf.cvss_score\) as max_cvss
FROM netscaler_ids na
JOIN public.tenable_findings tf ON tf.asset_id = na.id
JOIN public.cisa_kev ck ON ck.cve_id = tf.cve
GROUP BY tf.cve, ck.vulnerability_name
ORDER BY affected_devices DESC, max_cvss DESC NULLS LAST;" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=csg2025 psql -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -d vuln_db -t -A -F'|' --no-psqlrc -c "
-- NetScalers in ASM \(internet-facing\)
WITH netscaler_ids AS \(
  SELECT DISTINCT ta.ipv4, ta.hostname
  FROM public.tenable_assets ta,
       unnest\(ta.operating_systems\) v
  WHERE ta.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '90 days'
    AND \(v ILIKE '%netscal%' OR v ILIKE '%citrix%'\)
\)
SELECT na.ipv4, asm.port, asm.service, asm.severity_ranking, asm.last_seen::date
FROM netscaler_ids na
JOIN public.tenable_asm_assets asm ON asm.ip_address = na.ipv4
WHERE asm.last_seen >= NOW\(\) - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY asm.severity_ranking, na.ipv4
LIMIT 30;" 2>&1)
